programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: In 1996, 21-year-old Stephen Cameron was the victim of a road rage attack near London. An altercation with the driver of another vehicle left Stephen with two stab wounds, which proved fatal.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Stephen Griffiths was arrested on May 24, 2010 after being accused of murdering three women. All the victims were prostitutes who had worked in Bradford's red-light district, close to where he lived.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God wants us to go out into the world and love people. Be encouraged by Paul's writings in Galatians that with God's help, you can love everyone.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: After losing his father's medal on a hike, Elizabeth and Nathan organise a trip down memory lane for Little Jack with a very special surprise.

programme.title: The Last Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Becca is always a bridesmaid, but at her cousin's wedding she bonds with Kyle, the videographer covering every stage of the planning. Perhaps she won't be the last woman standing for long.

programme.sub-title: The Unseen Influence of a Godly Woman (Harrison Conley)

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: The Final Prophecy_The Triumph of the Gospel
programme.desc: Even as demonic forces work against us, God is working for us. He has ultimate power and will deliver us in His time.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Impacters Rule of Prayer and Daily Life Part 2
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: Is Buddhism compatible with Christianity? The short answer is no.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Hillsong Kids: Cubbyhouse
programme.desc: An entertaining show for the little ones aged between 2 and 6, with songs, fun craft time, bible stories and animated teaching and illustrations.

programme.title: God Rocks! Playlist
programme.desc: Join kid-hosts Myles and Stella for a fun, non-stop musical playlist of hit songs about Faith and Trust!

programme.title: Hunter & Twerp Scripture Seekers
programme.desc: Welcome to the wonderful world of Brightington, home of Hunter and Twerp, Scripture Seekers! Stacks of fun Bible lessons for children to enjoy.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Pulverizing the Plans of the Prince of Pride (An Adventure in Humility)
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame...Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Whirl
programme.desc: A cartoon series about the loveable, enthusiastic kids of First Second Church. In each episode, the kids tackle a different theme that is central to Christian values. Everything from generosity and forgiveness to doubt.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: Man V Food

programme.title: Car Fix

programme.desc: A man tries to give officers the slip. Witnesses call the cops when a well-dressed driver ploughs through multiple barricades. Deputies are surprised when a domestic call takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Liverpool Murders: Ashley & Olivia
programme.desc: Liverpool, 21 August 2022. Ashley Dale and Olivia Pratt-Korbel are fatally gunned down, innocent victims caught in a web of feuding organised crime groups.

programme.title: Making a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Sexy and ready to use her charms, Sheila LaBarre enticed two men to her farmyard lair before killing them. With unidentified bones in a burn pit, cops now needed to know who else she had killed.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A dead woman is found under a highway overpass with a satanic symbol written in blood near the body. In Birmingham, a community lives in fear after a teenager is shot in his apartment complex.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A year after a popular high school senior goes missing, a witness comes forward claiming to know who is responsible for her disappearance, and detectives must unravel a web of lies in order to learn the truth.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: When former homecoming queen Melinda Snyder is killed, her home town is embroiled in a mystery that wouldn't be settled for a long time.

programme.title: Disappeared

programme.title: Hollywood Demons

programme.desc: A shooting exposes a web of lies as criminal charges accumulate against Alex Murdaugh. Allegations of conspiracy upend life in his community.

programme.desc: When Miami peadiatric nurse Beverly is murdered under the most shocking of circumstances, the bravery of a witness will crack the case.

programme.desc: As a wedding nears, a gunman kills a mother at home. When detectives can't expose the lies, they call in Holland to draw out the truth.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: After the stabbing of hairstylist-to-the-stars Fabio Sementilli, a trail of passion and greed exposes a killer who sends shockwaves as far as Canada.

programme.title: Sumopedia

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: German urbanist Chris Dimmer focuses on the community-building potential of Japan's public bathhouses, or "Sento." He hopes that people living alone can rediscover the value of these bathhouses.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: What happens to lake water when it no longer freezes in winter? Detailed records of a "divine" freezing phenomenon of Lake Suwa in Japan have been kept for 580 years, but since 2018 it has not frozen.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Miyanaga Aiko (Contemporary artist) visits Kyoto. The Mincho font, drawn by hand in around 1990, evokes 350-year-old hand-carved woodblocks, made to print Buddhist sutras.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: We visit a factory in Hamamatsu, where they use technology, hand craft, and finely tuned instinct to make keyboard harmonicas (a.k.a. "melodicas") for everyone from schoolchildren to pro musicians.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: Kumano's heavy rainfall nurtures the 1,340 terraced rice paddies that make up Maruyama Senmaida. Through beautiful time-lapse footage, we show the flow of Kumano's water and the work of rice farmers.

programme.title: BOSAI: Science that Can Save Your Life

programme.title: Street Outlaws: End Game
programme.desc: JJ decides to get the whole family involved to rebuild what he knows best, a Chevy II Nova.

programme.title: Speed Is The New Black
programme.desc: A new client tasks Classic Car Studio with restoring her 1965 Cadillac El Dorado to its original 60's style while adding modern technology.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: Atheism cannot account for love. Without God, there can be no love.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Healing the Wounds of Rejection - Part 1

programme.title: Nothing is Impossible
programme.desc: Scott Beck's life has not gone to plan, working as the janitor at the high school where he was once the star of the basketball team. But opportunity arises when the local team holds open tryouts.

programme.title: County Rescue
programme.desc: With Duke's return fast approaching, Dani realizes her job is on the line; she questions God's path for her as she discovers her ex-fiance is back in town and faces a family emergency.

programme.title: Joel Osteen

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Bottled With Love
programme.desc: After being stood up, Abbey gets inspired to open her heart in a letter, put it in a bottle and toss it out to sea. Months later, a man fishing discovers it and opts to reach out.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Live With A Heavenly Perspective Pt 2 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Go Frills
programme.desc: For lots of original songs and loads of fun, join the Frills family aboard their funky fun tour bus as they have exciting adventures, meet new people and present their awesome live rock show.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds

programme.title: Little Worship Company

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: Lessons from Philippians: Heaven Is Our Homeland

programme.title: Alaska Missionaries
programme.desc: Missionaries, doing real work, helping people in remote parts of Alaska. With breathtaking scenery, adventurous landscapes and down to earth personalities, this Alaskan show just might become your family favourite.

programme.title: HumanKind

programme.title: Three Chairs

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: The Holy Spirit, the third Person of the Trinity, plays a specific role in our lives as Christians. He is our Helper who lives within us, provides us with strength, and points us to the truth.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started 20 years ago with Dr Jack Graham's vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ and developing Christians.

programme.sub-title: Healing the Wounds of Rejection - Part 2

programme.title: Red Joan
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of English-born Joan Stanley, who was recruited by the KGB in the mid 1930s and went undetected as a British spy for over a half a century.

programme.title: Hyde Park on Hudson

programme.title: McKellen: Playing the Part
programme.desc: Built upon a 14-hour interview, this film is a unique journey through the key landmarks of McKellen's life.

programme.title: Ginger & Rosa
programme.desc: UK. Two rebellious teenage dreamers see their friendship shatter as nuclear terror grips the world in the Cuban missile crisis.

programme.title: Set Fire To The Stars
programme.desc: An aspiring poet in 1950s New York has his ordered world shaken when he embarks on a week-long retreat to save his hell-raising hero, Dylan Thomas.

programme.title: Sea Fever
programme.desc: The crew of a West of Ireland trawler, marooned at sea, struggle for their lives against a growing parasite in their water supply.

programme.title: Finding Altamira
programme.desc: In 1879, a Spanish archaeologist (Antonio Banderas) and his daughter (Allegra Allen) cause worldwide controversy when they discover cave paintings that are 10,000 years old.

programme.title: Chances
programme.desc: An adult drama series following a family who wins millions of dollars in the lottery.

programme.title: Heaven's Burning
